description: Send notifications to your own Slack destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise slack:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Slack incoming-webhook {text} payload delivered straight to hooks.slack.com.
name: msg-to-slack

request.template: {"urls":"slack://${ customer_secrets.SLACK_TOKEN_A }/${ customer_secrets.SLACK_TOKEN_B }/${ customer_secrets.SLACK_TOKEN_C }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"slack://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_a_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_b_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_c_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}

gateway-plus.base_url: ${ customer_secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_BASE ?? https://hooks.slack.com/services }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_a_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_b_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_c_secret }} }

request.template: {"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
